title: Just stationery 100 Sheet A4 Refill Pad, White (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Side bound with two ring binder holes pre punched
description: From the manufacturer About us Being established for over 40 years, Tallon supply the wholesale and volume retail market with one of the largest ranges of stationery available. Our products are carefully sourced and we offer amazing value without compromising on our consistently high quality. Our design team are always on-hand to help you with product development and offer you innovative and appealing new products. Our extensive range of calendars consists of more than 150 titles and formats, specifically designed to appeal to a huge audience of all ages. In addition to this, we have one of the UK's largest selection of diary and organiser product; ranging from design-led, on-trend and innovatively designed product to office and commercial wall planners and diaries.
